_note: BU AI Ambassador Program - Cohort 2 Plan. Layouts + all 5 recipes.

placeholders.title: BU AI Ambassador Program
placeholders.subtitle: Cohort 2 Execution Plan - Scaling AI Adoption in Corporate Services

recipe_params.title: The Commitment - One Number, Baseline to Target

cards.label: BASELINE (TODAY)
cards.subtext: Weekly active Copilot in the BU

placeholders.title: Why CS, Why Now
content: AI at MS is a firmwide strategic priority - adoption is a measured outcome
Federated model: central enables, the BU delivers - no central owner of our outcomes
Cohort 1 feedback: ambassadors unclear on BU direction - Cohort 2 closes that gap
Peer BUs actively publishing use cases - the BU must keep pace or lag visibly
Cohort 2 is the inflection: scale deliberately now, or fall behind

items: Priority A: GenAI Education - baseline literacy
Priority B: Product Training - Copilot in daily workflows
Priority C: Adoption - trained users become active users
Concentrate ambassador time on A and B
Technical Depth programming - wrong profile for the BU

recipe_params.title: Cohort 1 vs Cohort 2 - What Doubling Unlocks (illustrative)

placeholders.title: How We'll Measure - Layered Framework
content: North star: % of BU population with weekly active Copilot usage
Adoption: % of trained users active within 30 days
Impact: BU use cases surfaced / deployed

placeholders.title: Risks at Scale
content: BU lags peer BUs on AI adoption - visibility erodes
Manager disengagement - ambassadors cannot get time
Data access missing - cannot target low-usage pockets
Ambassador attrition - coverage gaps, especially regional
AI governance uncertainty - use cases surface but cannot deploy

asks.title: Formal ambassador time allocation (~10%), ExCo-sanctioned
asks.body: Confirm BU AI Ambassadors may dedicate ~10% of working time to the program, protected from BAU reprioritization.
asks.why: Without sanctioned time, ambassador activity depends on goodwill - the Cohort 1 failure mode.

asks.title: ExCo endorsement email + AI objective in manager reviews
asks.body: ExCo-level email to BU managers naming ambassadors in their teams, with AI adoption as a manager performance objective.
asks.why: One email is worth ten ambassador sessions for modeling adoption behavior.
